decision: Use repo-local Go caches for verification
reason: Default module cache path /home/agent/go is not writable in this execution environment.
impact: Test and validation commands are run with GOCACHE and GOMODCACHE redirected under /workspace/socialpredict/.cache.

reason: The migration moved /v0/setup and /v0/setup/frontend behind configsvc.Service without changing their response semantics or route shape.
impact: No OpenAPI document edits were required; validation was limited to the existing OpenAPI spec test.
